# Hawaiʻi Wellness — AI Crawler Guidance
# https://hawaiiwellness.net
# See: https://llmstxt.org

Site: Hawaiʻi Wellness
URL: https://hawaiiwellness.net
Description: Hawaiʻi's holistic health directory — find certified practitioners and wellness centers across all islands. Serving Big Island, Maui, Oahu, and Kauai.

# Crawling permissions
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /dashboard
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /auth

# Attribution
Attribution: Required
Attribution-Format: Source: Hawaiʻi Wellness (hawaiiwellness.net)

# Contact info is intentionally excluded from crawlable pages.
# Use profile URLs to connect with providers.
